---
name: Security report
about: Report a security vulnerability in ultrapilot
title: "[Security] "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

## DO NOT POST PUBLICLY

If you have found a security vulnerability, please email the maintainers instead of filing a public issue. We follow responsible disclosure.

**Email**: see SECURITY.md

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the vulnerability.

## Affected versions

- ultrapilot version(s) affected: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce (kept private; do not include exploit code in the public issue).

## Impact

What is the worst-case impact? (data loss, arbitrary code execution, etc.)

## Suggested fix

If you have a suggested fix, describe it here.

## Disclosure timeline

What is your disclosure timeline? (when do you plan to publish)
